title: syrmatium distichum
intro: Syrmatium distichum, also known as the buttonbush or globe-flower, is a flowering plant in the family Cornaceae. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The leaves and flowers of Syrmatium distichum have been known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. Syrmatium distichum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and infusions in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting overall well-being.
